reason: Runner backend guideline index entry — entry point for runner spec navigation.

Stream rendering contract: SSE reconnect with sinceSeq, dedupe by sequence, readable assistant-delta aggregation, expanded view reuse — Coordinator chat panel subscription follows this contract.
Subscription lifecycle, EventSource cleanup, channel-switch state management for the new request→run channel handoff.
